who: small HR departments in accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month
offer: For small HR departments in accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month, manual timesheet entry causes formatting errors and delays in payroll processing. We automate the conversion of timesheet entries into formatted payroll summaries instead of manual entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
problem: manual timesheet entry leads to formatting errors and delays in payroll processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR departments
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll tools
DM outreach to small HR departments with demo
Share insights in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the process
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminders for data entry
Enable CSV import for existing timesheets
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
